name: Diabetic Fruit - Filled Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, blend the cream cheese and sour cream together with the Crisco shortening.
2. Add flour and salt to the mixture; mix well until combined.
3. Set the dough in the refrigerator for about 30 minutes to firm up.
4. Roll out half of the dough on a cookie sheet.
5. Spread the filling evenly over the rolled-out dough.
6. Place the other half of the dough on top of the filling.
7. Bake at 325 degrees Fahrenheit for 20-25 minutes, or until the top is golden brown.
8. Cook the mixed dried fruit in water over low heat until thickened. Let it cool before spreading over the dough.
